summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chroma Key Protocol interactive learning module. Fixed critical backend datetime serialization bug. All core functionality working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Pydantic validation error - datetime objects not serialized to strings
critical_bugs.impact: Blocked all authenticated frontend functionality with 500 errors
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Added datetime to string conversion in UserResponse endpoints

design_issues.issue: Button appears clickable but should be visually disabled
design_issues.note: Act IV does redirect to proper locked page, but visual state could be clearer

passed_tests: Auth me endpoint /api/auth/me returns user data
Journal CRUD operations - create, read, update, delete entries
Login page renders with cyber-noir design
Dashboard displays 4 Act cards with correct elemental colors
Act IV shows proper locked/sealed state on dedicated page
Journal page allows creating and editing entries
All dashboard widgets present and functional
Cyber-noir aesthetic properly implemented with gold accents
Elemental colors working (Green/Earth, Blue/Water, Red/Fire, Yellow/Air)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvement: Make Act IV button visually disabled on dashboard to match locked state (currently functional but could be clearer)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor visual improvement needed)
